## Summary

What changed?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Lesson content
- [ ] Refactor or cleanup
- [ ] Existing UI improvement

## Architecture Check

- [ ] UI does not directly access persistence
- [ ] Store -> repository -> persistence boundaries are preserved
- [ ] No major new product feature was added without prior discussion

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run format:check`

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or recordings for visible UI changes.
